name: Chandraghanta

distinctive_features: Crescent moon shaped like a bell on forehead
Third eye in the middle of forehead
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Symmetrical arrangement of ten arms holding various weapons

domain_specific_visual.WEAPONS_HELD: Trident, mace, bow, arrow, sword, lotus, bell, waterpot
domain_specific_visual.POSTURE: One hand in abhayamudra (fear dispelling gesture)

functional_attributes.primary_function: Destroyer of demons and protector of devotees

relationships.description: Chandraghanta is a form of the goddess Mahadevi.
Chandraghanta is the shakti of Shiva in the form of Chandrashekhara.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents divine strength and protection during Navaratri

contrastive_constraints: NOT a generic goddess without specific attributes
NOT without the crescent moon on the forehead
NOT depicted without a lion as her vehicle
